channel.title: AML Agents Briefing
channel.description: A 4 to 6 minute daily two-host audio briefing for MLROs, heads of financial-crime compliance, AML supervisors, and senior compliance leaders across the Asia-Pacific region. Each morning Alex and Jordan cover the most material APAC AML and financial-crime developments — regulator notices, enforcement actions, supervisory thematic findings, obligations falling due, and horizon-scanning items — with concrete action items for the listener's working day. Produced by TrustSphere Partners. Full detail at amlagents.streamlit.app.
channel.itunes:author: TrustSphere Partners
channel.itunes:summary: A 4 to 6 minute daily two-host audio briefing for MLROs, heads of financial-crime compliance, AML supervisors, and senior compliance leaders across the Asia-Pacific region. Each morning Alex and Jordan cover the most material APAC AML and financial-crime developments — regulator notices, enforcement actions, supervisory thematic findings, obligations falling due, and horizon-scanning items — with concrete action items for the listener's working day. Produced by TrustSphere Partners. Full detail at amlagents.streamlit.app.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Daily APAC AML and financial-crime briefing
channel.itunes:keywords: AML, anti-money laundering, financial crime, compliance, MLRO, FATF, MAS, HKMA, BNM, JAFIC, KoFIU, AUSTRAC, FIU NZ, AMLC, PPATK, APAC, Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Australia, Japan, Korea, Indonesia, Philippines, New Zealand, fraud, sanctions

item.title: AML Agents Briefing — Friday, 15 May 2026
item.description: Welcome to AML Agents Briefing for Friday, 15 May 2026. This is your audio overview of the most material AML and financial crime developments across the Asia-Pacific region today. Full detail, obligation registers, and horizon scanning are at amlagents dot streamlit dot app.

item.title: AML Agents Briefing — Saturday, 02 May 2026
item.description: Welcome to the AML Agents Briefing. This is a stub episode — the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret is not configured for the daily-briefing GitHub Actions workflow. Once it is, this slot will carry a three-to-five minute conversational summary of the day's most material APAC financial-crime developments, ...
